channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Red Sox DH Rafael Devers is 1st big leaguer with 10 strikeouts in 3 games to open a season
item.description: Boston Red Sox designated hitter Rafael Devers has become the first major league player to strike out 10 times in the first three games of a season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NBA great Shaquille O'Neal's son Shaqir leaving Florida A&M and transferring again: report
item.description: Shaqir O'Neal will enter the transfer portal, On3 reported. The junior forward started 17 games for Florida A&M last season after two years at Texas Southern.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blue Jays' Max Scherzer felt 'imminent danger' after latest injury cuts season debut short
item.description: Max Scherzer seemed to have an issue with his thumb, which prompted Blue Jays manager John Schneider to pull the three-time Cy Young Award winner from a game in the third inning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bueckers has career-high 40 to lead one-woman March Madness rout for UConn, 82-59 over Oklahoma
item.description: SPOKANE, Wash. (AP) — Paige Bueckers scored a career-high 40 points, rescuing UConn from its first-half doldrums and single-handedly turning a tight game against Oklahoma into an 82-59 rout on Saturday that sent the Huskies to the Elite Eight of the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Aryna Sabalenka beats Jessica Pegula in Miami Open final for 19th tour title
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Aryna Sabalenka entered the Miami Open final against Jessica Pegula with 18 career titles on her elite resume. The Miami Open crown had proved elusive until Saturday. The No.
item.dc:creator: MARC BERMAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: MJ Iraldi rallies Nova Southeastern past Cal State Dominguez Hills 74-73 in Division II title game
item.description: EVANSVILLE, Ind. (AP) — MJ Iraldi made two free throws with 17.8 seconds left and finished with 27 points to rally Nova Southeastern to a 74-73 victory over Cal State Dominguez Hills in the championship game of the Division II Tournament on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auburn's Pettiford, Michigan State's Richardson renew AAU rivalry in Elite Eight of March Madness
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Auburn's Tahaad Pettiford and Michigan State's Jase Richardson are high-scoring, left-handed freshman guards who have more in common than big games that helped to propel their teams to the NCAA Tournament's Elite Eight.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Falcons' Kirk Cousins sparks trade rumors with trip to Cleveland
item.description: Quarterback Kirk Cousins didn't attempt to hide his offseason travels after he was pictured at several restaurants in Cleveland this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CF Montreal seeks first win of the season, visits the Chicago Fire
item.description: CF Montreal (0-4-1) vs. Chicago Fire (3-1-1) Chicago; Saturday, 8:30 p.m. EDT BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Chicago -175, Montreal +429, Draw +308; over/under is 2.5 goals BOTTOM LINE: CF Montreal seeks its first victory of the season when it visits the Chicago Fire.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: RSL seeks redemption in Minnesota after home setback
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4) — Real Salt Lake looks to bounce back from a rare home loss as they go on the road to face Minnesota United FC on Saturday night. Real Salt Lake’s attack will be bolstered by the return of Polish attacking winger Dominic Marzcuk and U.S.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: White Sox hammer Angels in lopsided Opening Day win
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The weather on White Sox Opening Day mirrored their franchise outlook heading into 2025. Murky, gray and dreary with little to be excited about besides the fact baseball season is all the way back. Good thing the White Sox played well in spite of the melancholy conditions.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: State audit reveals Anaheim doesn’t know condition of Angel Stadium on Opening Day
item.description: A report from the California State Auditor found that the city of Anaheim has not been able to ensure that Angel Stadium, one of the oldest stadiums in the majors, is being properly maintained.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5

item.title: Colorado State's Niko Medved leaves for Minnesota after 7-year run with Rams
item.description: Niko Medved, the second-winningest coach in Rams' history, has accepted the head coaching job with the Big Ten's Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Tiger Woods confirms relationship with Vanessa Trump
item.description: “Love is in the air and life is better with you by my side! We look forward to our journey through life together,” Woods said on X, where he has 6.4 million followers.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU fans celebrate Sweet 16 bid with Cougars
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Hours after BYU pulled out a 91-89 thriller over Wisconsin to advance to its first Sweet 16 since 2011, hundred of diehard BYU fans showed up at Provo Airport at 1:30 in the morning to welcome the conquering heroes back from Denver. "What a game!" said one BYU fan.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Alabama rolls by Saint Mary's 80-66 to reach the NCAA Tournament's Sweet 16 for a 3rd straight year
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Alabama turned the page on the program's first Final Four appearance the moment the players received their commemorative rings in October. Coach Nate Oats knew his team needed to get a little deeper and more athletic, and find more balance to go even further this season.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KRON4
